response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with strong recent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators — directly matching the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) and architectural ownership across multiple senior roles.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node/React stack with recent production experience
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, open-source ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles
Cloud experience skews AWS/CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
